alternate_path_hints.description: Hints for alternate network paths that could be taken.

arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the network insights analysis.

explanations.description: Detailed explanations of the network path analysis and any issues found.

filter_in_arns.description: List of ARNs used to filter the network insights analysis.

forward_path_components.description: Components involved in the forward path of the network insights analysis.

id.description: The ID of the network insights analysis.

network_insights_analysis_id.description: The ID specifically for this network insights analysis.

network_insights_path_id.description: The ID of the network insights path associated with this analysis.

path_found.description: Indicates whether a valid network path was found.

return_path_components.description: Components involved in the return path of the network insights analysis.

start_date.description: The start date and time of the network insights analysis.

status.description: The current status of the network insights analysis.

status_message.description: Additional information about the status of the analysis.

tags.description: Tags associated with the network insights analysis.

warning_message.description: Any warning messages related to the network insights analysis.
